creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

i have bought an [1] Fnatic Gear STREAK65 keyboard and it dont seems to work correctly on FreeBSD.

I have tested it first in the FreeBSD bootloader in the loader prompt and everything seems to work fine. But when i boot into the OS then the keys dont stay pressed when they are get pressed physically.

ugen0.10: <Fnatic Gear Fnatic Gear STREAK60> at usbus0
ukbd2 on uhub0
ukbd2: <Fnatic Gear Fnatic Gear STREAK60, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.10, addr 9> on usbus0
kbd4 at ukbd2
uhid5 on uhub0
uhid5: <Fnatic Gear Fnatic Gear STREAK60, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.10, addr 9> on usbus0


[1] https://fnatic.com/products/streak-65-ultra-compact-esports-keyboard

I appreciate any help.
